description: Audit the 'Holding Area' workspace and organize the documents 'Product-Specs', 'User-Guide', 'Marketing-Flyer', and 'Internal-Memo' based on their version numbers. Move documents with a version number less than 1.0 into the 'Drafts' subfolder and those with a version number of 1.0 or higher into the 'Released' subfolder, ensuring no documents remain in the root of the Holding Area.
